title: ON Semiconductor: This Is The Plunge That I've Been Waiting For (Rating Upgrade)
text: ON Semiconductor stock collapsed, losing most of its gains over the past year. The company faces broad-based challenges in the automotive industry, including inventory issues and high interest rates. It has also lowered its silicon carbide revenue for 2023. As a result of the collapse, ON's valuation has normalized, as the market quickly priced in these challenges. As such, ON is looking attractive again.
